bird.name: 北美黃林鶯
bird.summary: 北美黃林鶯（學名：Setophaga petechia），是一種新世界鶯，屬於雀形目森鶯科橙尾鴝鶯屬，分布範圍涵蓋大部分赤道以北的美洲地區，有多達35個亞種。 參考資料 外部連結 Yellow breasted Warbler by John Audubon Yellow Wa…

relations.subject: 北美黃林鶯
relations.evidence: thumb|upright|Female yellow warbler attending nestlings, [[Yukon Flats National Wildlife Refuge, Alaska, United States]] thumb|right|Male (above) and female yellow warblers foraging in a reedbed, Mill Creek Streamway Park, [[Kansas, United States]] American yellow warblers breed in most of North America from the tundra southwards, except for the far Southwest and the Gulf of Mexico coast. American yellow warblers winter to the south of their breeding range, from southern California to the Amazon region, Bolivia and Peru. The mangrove and golden warblers occur to the south of it, to the northern reaches of the Andes
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

relations.subject: 北美黃林鶯
relations.evidence: No significant negative effects of American yellow and mangrove warblers on humans have been recorded. Being generally common and occurring over a wide range, the yellow warbler is not considered a threatened species by the IUCN. Some local decline in numbers has been found in areas, mainly due to habitat destruction and pollution
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 北美黃林鶯

relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
